displayName: Conditional Access Policy Automation for Copilot

defaults.emergencyAccessGuidance: Record tenant break-glass/emergency-access group object IDs before enabling Conditional Access policies. Microsoft recommends excluding at least one emergency-access account from every Conditional Access policy so that a misconfigured policy cannot lock every administrator out of the tenant.
defaults.targetResourceGuidance: Use the Microsoft Graph Office365 Conditional Access app-suite value for Microsoft 365 Copilot coverage; add individual app IDs only after tenant service-principal validation.
